page_title: Best Day Trips from Milan: Cinque Terre, Lake Como, the Swiss Alps and More
meta_description: A practical overview of the best day trips from Milan — Cinque Terre, Lake Como and Lugano, the Bernina Express to St Moritz — with honest timing, season, and how-to notes.

notes: TOFU destination guide for cinque-terre-from-milan cluster.
Cinque Terre is the headline / primary CTA. Lake Como & Lugano and the Bernina Express are mentioned as sibling cluster options to broaden discovery without diluting conversion.
Cluster cross-links to Lake Como and Bernina TOFU/BOFU assets are conditional — check live slugs before publish.
